value: Blind Dinners
Where titles fade and people have real talk.
Blind Dinners are small, invitation-only gatherings Amanda hosts and cooks herself.
Guests do not know who else is attending until they arrive.
The room brings together founders, creatives, executives, and builders from different backgrounds to talk honestly about business, ownership, and navigating rooms that were not built for us.

value: The Room
Hosted at home, built for honest conversation.
Blind Dinners are intimate by design. They are not events built for visibility. They are rooms built for trust.

value: Who Comes
Founders, creatives, executives, and builders in one room.
The mix matters. Different backgrounds create better conversation, sharper perspective, and a different kind of honesty.

value: Format
No panels. No speakers. No networking scripts.

Just real conversation around the table.
Private by design
